def test_request_no_auth(): > res = no_auth_client.list_users() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:284: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ rest_client/base/util.py:18: in wrapper return function(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:19: in list_users return self._request(kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = , data = {} args = (), kwargs = {} request_config = RequestConfig(path='users', name='list_users', method='GET', options=None) future = res = response = b'Just a moment...Just a moment...

testcase.name: test_register_user_post_with_bearer_auth

testcase.failure:
def test_register_user_post_with_bearer_auth(): try: > res = auth_client.register_user( **{"name": "Tenali Ramakrishna", "gender": "male", "email": "fhtderze@15ce.com", "status": "active"})
tests/base/test_client.py:300: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ rest_client/base/client.py:110: in wrapper return self.method_template(self.endpoints.get(item))(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ rest_client/base/client.py:121: in fn return self._request(kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <tests.base.test_client.AuthClient object at 0x106afa950> data = {'email': 'fhtderze@15ce.com', 'gender': 'male', 'name': 'Tenali Ramakrishna', 'status': 'active'} args = (), kwargs = {} request_config = RequestConfig(path='users', name='register_user', method='POST', options=<class 'dict'>) future = <Future at 0x106b13310 state=finished returned Response> res = <Response [500]> response = {'error': 'Internal Server Error', 'status': 500}
def _request(self, data: dict, *args, **kwargs) -> ApiResponse: request_config: RequestConfig = data.pop('request_config') log.debug(request_config) self._log_request(args, data, kwargs, request_config)
future = self.session.request( # Use FuturesSession to make the request request_config.method, self._path(request_config.path), headers=kwargs.pop('headers', self.headers), data=data.get('payload') or json.dumps(data) if data and request_config.method in ('POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH') else None, params=data if request_config.method in ('GET', 'DELETE') else None, auth=self.auth )
res = future.result() # Get the response from the Future
self._log_response(res)
try: response = res.json() except JSONDecodeError: response = res.content
if 200 <= res.status_code < 400: return ApiResponse(response, res.headers, res.status_code) > raise ApiException(response, res.headers, res.status_code) E rest_client.base.exceptions.ApiException: ({'status': 500, 'error': 'Internal Server Error'}, {'Date': 'Sat, 07 Mar 2026 18:17:44 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=UTF-8', 'Content-Length': '46', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'vary': 'Origin', 'x-request-id': '9fcceb69-a3a7-421b-bace-e3300ab7d008', 'x-runtime': '0.074989', 'Nel': '{"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800}', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Report-To': '{"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=vApA%2BHkpJdfrCiJkEN9iVYKFr4DjXq2CukUz3KUWROhOnNQ2TufG2wGS0z1cYfQNTsNZFfKC1rnF3R7%2BX5VOUmbxFMCV9nnn4Sg%3D"}]}', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'CF-RAY': '9d8b99445f4bb445-HKG', 'alt-svc': 'h3=":443"; ma=86400'}, 500)
rest_client/base/client.py:88: ApiException
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
def test_register_user_post_with_bearer_auth(): try: res = auth_client.register_user( **{"name": "Tenali Ramakrishna", "gender": "male", "email": "fhtderze@15ce.com", "status": "active"}) assert res.status_code == 201 except ApiException as e: > assert e.status_code == 422 E assert 500 == 422 E + where 500 = ApiException({'status': 500, 'error': 'Internal Server Error'}, {'Date': 'Sat, 07 Mar 2026 18:17:44 GMT', 'Content-Typ...xFMCV9nnn4Sg%3D"}]}', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'CF-RAY': '9d8b99445f4bb445-HKG', 'alt-svc': 'h3=":443"; ma=86400'}, 500).status_code

def test_json_configured_client(): > res = json_configured_client.list_users_json_endpoint() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:308: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ rest_client/base/client.py:110: in wrapper return self.method_template(self.endpoints.get(item))(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ rest_client/base/client.py:121: in fn return self._request(kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = data = {}, args = (), kwargs = {} request_config = RequestConfig(path='users', name='list_users_json_endpoint', method='GET', options={}) future = res = response = b'Just a moment...Just a moment...
